name: Louisiana Seafood Gumbo
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the roux by stirring oil and flour together constantly until it reaches a dark brown color.
2. Add shrimp to the roux and cook for a few minutes. Set aside.
3. In a separate pan, sauté okra and onions in oil until they are almost done.
4. Add tomatoes and garlic to the pan when the okra is nearly cooked through. Cook for a few more minutes.
5. Pour in water, salt, black pepper, and red pepper flakes. Stir well.
6. Combine the shrimp roux mixture with the okra mixture and let it simmer for about 10 minutes.
7. Add oysters, crabmeat, and any whole crabs to the pot. Continue cooking until the crabs are cooked through.
8. Stir in parsley and scallion tops. Let the gumbo simmer for another 15-20 minutes.
9. Serve over rice and allow each person to add fresh file to their dish according to taste.
